source.title: Source · License
source.hint: This service is open-sourced under {{license}}. AGPL §13 requires operators to provide visitors with the matching source code.

history.title: Generation history retention
history.hint: No cron — every new generation triggers an opportunistic prune. Saving 0 in either knob below disables that dimension.

storage.title: Local storage
storage.hint: Uploads and generation results land in the data dir below, served at /static/uploads/<key>. Mount it as a dedicated volume in production for easy backup. i2i / i2v auto-stage through DashScope's temp bucket — no extra setup.

dashscope.timeoutsHint: Submit timeout per model kind. Polling is fixed at 10s. Empty = default; saved value ≥ 1s.
dashscope.baseUrlHint: DashScope (Bailian) gateway. Default https://dashscope.aliyuncs.com; international accounts use https://dashscope-intl.aliyuncs.com.
dashscope.apiKeyHint: Encrypted at rest (AES-256-GCM). UI shows masked form only (e.g. sk-1de...0252). Edits take effect within ~30 seconds.

openai.timeoutsHint: Defaults are slightly wider (DALL-E 3 / GPT-image occasionally exceed 60 s). No video / audio provider yet — fields kept for forward-compat. Empty = default; saved value ≥ 1s.
openai.baseUrlHint: Any OpenAI Chat Completions / Images Generations gateway (OpenAI / OpenRouter / Together / Groq / vLLM). Must include /v1, no trailing slash.
openai.apiKeyHint: Encrypted at rest (AES-256-GCM). UI shows masked form only. Once configured, openai-chat/<model> and openai-image/<model> become addable under Config.

volcengine.timeoutsHint: Only video active today (Seedance 2.0 / 2.0 Fast). chat / image / audio fields kept for forward-compat. Polling is fixed at 10s.
volcengine.baseUrlHint: Volcengine Ark Seedance gateway. Default https://ark.cn-beijing.volces.com/api/v3. Private proxies with matching path layout slot in too. Don't include /contents/... — provider appends it.
volcengine.apiKeyHint: Bearer token (use ARK_API_KEY for the official endpoint, proxy key for self-hosted). Encrypted at rest with AES-256-GCM.
volcengine.ossWarning: Seedance i2v / r2v also needs Object Storage (OSS / TOS) configured below — without it, locally uploaded images can't be fetched by Volcengine servers and only t2v works.

config.importConfirm: Current canvas config has unsaved changes — import will overwrite. Continue?
